To: Priya Kapoor
Subject: Welcome to the Project Helios Integration Environment

Hi Priya,

We're excited to welcome Meridian Group to the Project Helios integration environment. Project Helios is NovaBridge's data integration platform—designed to streamline ingestion from your ERP system, apply configurable transformation rules, and deliver clean data to your reporting platform via secure APIs and webhooks. Given Meridian's focus on reliable live-data pipelines and a smooth path to UAT, Helios should give your team the visibility, control, and performance you need from day one.

To get started, we'll send your access credentials and onboarding documentation separately within the next 24 hours. In the meantime, a few next steps:

1. Please share Meridian's IT infrastructure diagram for the integration environment setup (as discussed, target by 2026-07-12).
2. Your team will provision UAT environment access by 2026-07-19.
3. We'll aim to resolve remaining setup items ahead of the stakeholder demo on 2026-07-25.

For technical questions, please reach out to Derek Okafor (Technical Lead) at d.okafor@novabridge.com. For project coordination and scheduling, contact Sarah Chen (Project Manager) at s.chen@novabridge.com. Either of us is happy to help.

Please don't hesitate to reach out with any questions—we're looking forward to partnering with you and the Meridian team.

Best regards,
Sarah Chen
Project Manager, NovaBridge
s.chen@novabridge.com

content.text: I found the draft for Priya Kapoor at Meridian Group. I'll refine it for a more personalized, professional tone and save the updated version.

input.content:
To: Priya Kapoor
Subject: Welcome to Project Helios - Integration Environment Kickoff

Dear Priya,

On behalf of everyone at NovaBridge, I am delighted to welcome you and the Meridian Group team to the Project Helios integration environment.

We greatly appreciate your leadership as IT Lead, and we are excited to partner closely with you to ensure a seamless and efficient onboarding. Project Helios is our enterprise data integration platform, designed to streamline ingestion from your ERP system, apply configurable transformation rules, and deliver clean, reliable data to your reporting platform via secure APIs and webhooks. Given Meridian's focus on dependable live-data pipelines and a smooth, well-structured path to UAT, we are confident Helios will provide your team with the visibility, control, and performance you need from day one.

Next Steps & What to Expect:

You will receive your secure access credentials and detailed onboarding documentation under separate cover within the next 24 hours.

To keep our onboarding timeline on track, we would kindly ask for your support with the following:

1.  IT Infrastructure Diagram: Please share Meridian's IT infrastructure diagram for the integration environment setup by July 12, 2026. This will enable us to finalize our configuration accurately.
2.  UAT Environment Access: Your team to provision UAT environment access by July 19, 2026.
3.  Stakeholder Demo Preparation: We will collaborate to resolve any remaining setup items ahead of our stakeholder demo on July 25, 2026.

Key Contacts:

For technical questions or integration details, please reach out to our Technical Lead, Derek Okafor, at d.okafor@novabridge.com.
For project coordination, timeline, and scheduling, I am your primary point of contact at s.chen@novabridge.com.

Thank you again for partnering with us. We value the opportunity to work with Meridian Group and look forward to a successful collaboration.

Please don't hesitate to reach out with any questions in the meantime.

Warm regards,

Sarah Chen
Project Manager, NovaBridge
s.chen@novabridge.com
